query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, COALESCE(p.productLane,'null') AS productLane, p.sector,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sr
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.location LIKE '% WA%' OR p.location LIKE '%western australia%')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sr DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, COALESCE(p.productLane,'null') AS productLane, p.sector,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sr
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.actionTier = 'tier1_actionable'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.location LIKE '% WA%' OR p.location LIKE '%western australia%')
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sr DESC
LIMIT 5;
